title: Retire the optional Systemkatalog HTTP runtime
goal: Remove the optional local Systemkatalog HTTP service after a source- and task-bound backup, preserve the static catalog artifact contract, and merge the already reviewed static-only Systemkatalog change only after live retirement evidence exists.

approval.note: The operator explicitly instructed Grabowski to complete the prepared Systemkatalog retirement. The effect is one-shot, exact-head-bound, backup-first and revoked on any mismatch.

acceptance.assertion: This exact task and its one-shot break-glass authorization are merged into bureau:main before any service stop, disablement or runtime file removal occurs.

origin/main:ops/install/retire-local-runtime.sh is executed from clean Systemkatalog commit dad18bf4ad62b88d349aad1288f92048d8af647f with Bureau:OPERATOR-ECOSYSTEM-REDUNDANCY-V1-T023 as the authorization reference.
The retirement tool creates a checksum-bound backup, RESTORE.md and retirement-receipt.json before removing the installed unit and executables.

systemkatalog.service is inactive, disabled and unloaded after daemon-reload; ~/.config/systemd/user/systemkatalog.service, ~/.local/bin/systemkatalog and ~/.local/bin/systemkatalogctl are absent; port 4001 no longer listens.
Private Cabinet/Systemkatalog archives, backups, ignored local state and historical receipts remain untouched.
Registry JSON/JSONL, rendered Markdown, Mermaid and map artifact manifest remain valid and consumer-facing canonical files are unchanged by the runtime retirement.

Systemkatalog PR #123 is updated with the real Bureau task and retirement receipt, rebased on current main, fully revalidated, removed from draft and merged only after all prior acceptance evidence passes.
T023 and the initiative are updated with the Systemkatalog merge commit, backup/receipt hashes and live absence proof in a reviewed Bureau closeout.

rollback.trigger: Any failure before final absence verification or any newly discovered required HTTP consumer.
rollback.procedure: Use the generated RESTORE.md and checksum manifest to reinstall the exact backed-up unit and executables, run systemctl --user daemon-reload, enable and start systemkatalog.service, then verify /healthz before stopping the task.

conditions: T023 is not yet present in bureau:origin/main
a foreign Bureau or Systemkatalog lease, dirty state, process or overlapping pull request is present
Systemkatalog main is not clean or differs from dad18bf4ad62b88d349aad1288f92048d8af647f before the retirement apply
the installed unit or executable hashes differ from the dry-run snapshot
PR #123 head differs from 78872ce230e7e1a7ed5ad04cd33af089b2369362 before final rebase
a required HTTP consumer is discovered
backup, receipt or absence verification fails

metadata.source_decision: The operator instructed Grabowski to complete the already prepared Systemkatalog runtime retirement.

scope: merge this authorization into bureau:main before effect
run the exact-head-bound Systemkatalog retirement tool with backup-first semantics
remove only the installed systemkatalog.service unit, systemkatalog executable and systemkatalogctl executable
verify receipt, checksums, service absence, file absence and port-4001 absence
bind the retirement evidence into Systemkatalog PR #123 and Bureau closeout
merge Systemkatalog PR #123 only after all exact-head tests and GitHub checks pass
conditions: no foreign lease or dirty-state overlap
T023 is merged before runtime mutation
Systemkatalog main equals dad18bf4ad62b88d349aad1288f92048d8af647f at apply time
the live dry-run preconditions and installed hashes still match
the retirement tool creates rollback artifacts before deletion
the reviewed static-only PR remains consumer-compatible and is revalidated after task binding
does_not_authorize: force-releasing foreign leases or modifying foreign worktrees
deletion of private Cabinet or Systemkatalog state, archives, backups or historical receipts
mutation of unrelated repositories, services or ports
merging PR #123 before live retirement proof

does_not_establish: future runtime state after the observed dry-run
permission to bypass Bureau or Grabowski leases
permission to delete private or historical state

verification.verification_note: T023 was merged before effect; the one-shot authorization was consumed once; backup hashes verify; the service, installed files and port 4001 are absent; Systemkatalog PR #123 and both RepoBrief publication paths are bound to merge commit 4ed6e28e30210a1a68f80501dda7328741b73442.
